keys.description: started_at cannot be more than this many days in the future. Rejects nonsense hire dates.
started_at cannot be more than this many days in the past unless caller carries `staff.hire.retroactive`. Guards against retroactive-hire audit-trail launders.
Default status when creating a Staff row. `pre_hire` is safer (waits for the User to accept + verify email). Direct-to-active is allowed when caller carries `staff.hire`.
Pre-hire rows past this age auto-fire a NudgePendingHireNotification to HR. After 90 days they auto-transition to `terminated_before_start` (a special offboarded sub-state).
CheckProbationEndingSoonJob fires reminders at these day-thresholds before probation_ends_at.
Compensation changes exceeding this percent (up or down) refuse unless caller carries `staff.manage.compensation.large-delta`. Fat-finger guard against payroll fat-finger errors.
Fallback currency when the Staff.branch.region.currency is unknown at compensation-set time. Never used in normal flow — every branch has a region with a currency.
How long staff_compensation_history rows retain. Aligns with the 7-year financial-record retention across the platform.
Baseline. Any finding above this is a P1 signal (multiple managers per branch or a manager not in 'active' state).
Days after Staff.ended_at at which emergency_contact_name/phone/relationship + tax_id_last4 are redacted.
Days after Staff.ended_at at which the row becomes eligible for hard-purge (subject to no downstream references).
If a staff lingers in the offboarding state, dispatch reminder to HR at these day-thresholds.
Pre-expiry reminder thresholds for coach certifications.
A pre_hire staff row aged past this fires a NudgePendingHireNotification to HR.
